description: DurableTaskResourceExtensions methods (AddDurableTaskScheduler, AddTaskHub, RunAsEmulator, WithTaskHubName) are now marked [Experimental] with diagnostic ID ASPIREDURABLETASK001, signaling that the API shape may change before going GA. Add #pragma warning disable ASPIREDURABLETASK001 to suppress the build warning.
name: Durable Task Scheduler APIs marked as Experimental
